title: Day 7 Lesson 2 ( Video )Asking when something is done or was done
html:
Day 7 - Lesson 2

いつする か いつした か きく (itsusuru ka itsushita ka kiku) = Asking when something was done or will be done

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　(kyooshitsu) = Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): りんさん りゅうがくせい,  やまださん にほんじん (Lin-san ryuugaksee, Yamada-san nihonjin) = Yamada-san Japanese person, Lin-san study abroad student

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section
